text: ↩resume rtsc H_006 real verdict: run 3D flat-band ED (src/ + cloud pod) to compute geometry (∫tr g) AND coupling Ω vs dimension together. Toy probe (state/h006_fs_dimension_scan_2026_06_24) showed dimension-EXTENSIVE geometry lever (⟨tr g⟩=0.25·d, ratio 3.0) → dimension-FRAME bypass not closed at toy level; real material verdict still pending. Card: HYPOTHESES/cards/H_006_fs_bound_dimension_invariance.md. Also worth carding: brainstorm seeds S5 (charge-spin-orbital fractionalization) + O2 (disorder-induced flat band).

↩resume +@ real verdict: H_005 combination capstone reached room-T in TOY band (bkt_Tc~319K, each lever necessary) but FACTORIZED into 2 stacked unsolved sub-problems — (a) phonon-transparent/electron-opaque interface (H_003 electron_cost<=0.415) + (b) competing-order-free electronic eV-glue (H_004). Closed-form deepening DEPLETED. Real verdict needs DFT/DFPT/el-ph heterostructure calc (src/ + cloud pod) on a real spacer + electronic-glue candidate. Cards: HYPOTHESES/cards/H_003..H_005.
